name_en: 。!!️《Includes Full Original Green Box Packaging》!!️【New】Gucci Jackie Small Shoulder Bag. This brand-new Gucci Jackie Small shoulder bag is crafted from top-quality leather, showcasing the brand's exquisite craftsmanship, crescent shape, and stylish design. The light gold-tone hardware, leather trim, and matching red and green webbing strap combine to offer more styling possibilities for this light green patent leather Gucci Jackie Small shoulder bag. Light green patent leather, light gold-tone hardware, leather lining, Inside: 1 zip pocket, Gucci logo zip pull, Handle (18cm high) Removable webbing shoulder strap (52cm high) Hook closure, Weight: approx. 0.4kg.
